sources.title: Workflow Proof Market Note
sources.rationale: Workflow Proof Market Note Buyers increasingly expect measurable rollout proof, explicit workflow controls, and visible approval boundaries before they trust AI-assisted PM systems.

sources.title: RivalFlow Competitor Overview
sources.rationale: RivalFlow Competitor Overview RivalFlow emphasizes automation breadth and all-in-one workflow coverage for PM teams.

sources.title: Customer Signal
sources.rationale: They want clearer queue ownership, fewer manual follow-up loops, and evidence they can reuse instead of restating context in every review.
